# MainframeStudyHub

> MainframeStudyHub is a free IBM Z mainframe learning platform offering tutorials, quizzes, abend code reference, and career roadmap for mainframe professionals.

## Topics

- [z/OS Fundamentals](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): IBM Z operating system concepts, architecture, and administration
- [JCL](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): Job Control Language syntax, parameters, and best practices
- [COBOL](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): COBOL programming for mainframe applications
- [DB2](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): DB2 for z/OS database management and SQL
- [CICS](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): CICS transaction processing and application programming
- [VSAM](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): Virtual Storage Access Method file systems
- [REXX](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): REXX scripting for z/OS automation
- [IMS](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): IMS Database and Transaction Manager
- [RACF](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): Resource Access Control Facility security
- [Modernization](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#topics): z/OS Connect, Zowe CLI, and hybrid cloud

## Features

- [Quiz](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#quiz): 200 questions across 14 mainframe topics
- [Abend Solver](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#abends): 87 IBM abend codes with cause, fix, and tips
- [Learning Roadmap](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#roadmap): 6-level career path from Trainee to Architect
- [Community](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#community): Q&A forum for mainframe professionals
- [About](https://mainframestudyhub.com/#about): Platform mission and contact information
